pain_point: Manual data extraction from complex K-1s and 1099s into CCH ProSystem fx, taking up senior tax staff's billable hours.
draft_email: I noticed on your Careers page that you're currently expanding your team and hiring a Senior Tax Accountant with strong experience in CCH ProSystem fx. As your practice grows, your senior staff likely spend an increasing amount of non-billable time manually extracting and inputting complex K-1 and 1099 data into your tax software. CPAAutomation.ai's document parsing seamlessly extracts this data directly into CCH, allowing your senior accountants to focus on advisory work instead of manual entry.
